creator: vampludie@gmail.com
text:
syslog-ng can not be built with supporting MYSQL. Can not find -ldbi.
libdbi-drivers is install.

Name           : libdbi-drivers
Version        : 0.9.0_2
Origin         : databases/libdbi-drivers
Architecture   : freebsd:9:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : devel databases
Options        :
        MYSQL          : true
        PGSQL          : false
        SQLITE3        : false



  CCLD     modules/afsocket/libafsocket-tls.la
  CC       modules/afsql/modules_afsql_libafsql_la-afsql.lo
modules/afsql/afsql.c: In function 'afsql_dd_connect':
modules/afsql/afsql.c:546: warning: 'dbi_conn_new' is deprecated (declared at /usr/local/include/dbi/dbi.h:199)
modules/afsql/afsql.c: In function 'afsql_dd_init':
modules/afsql/afsql.c:1025: warning: 'dbi_initialize' is deprecated (declared at /usr/local/include/dbi/dbi.h:169)
  CC       modules/afsql/modules_afsql_libafsql_la-afsql-grammar.lo
  CC       modules/afsql/modules_afsql_libafsql_la-afsql-parser.lo
  CC       modules/afsql/modules_afsql_libafsql_la-afsql-plugin.lo
  CCLD     modules/afsql/libafsql.la
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -ldbi
gmake[2]: *** [modules/afsql/libafsql.la] Error 1
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
